page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores from the Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor family, running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, the instance provides dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include bundled local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for persistent data. It is equipped with a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or onboard GPU hardware. Given its balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio and dedicated compute resources, the ecs.g8ine.2xlarge is designed for general-purpose workloads such as web serving, application servers, containerized microservices, and moderate database hosting where consistent CPU performance is required.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ine.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 8 dedicated physical cores from the Intel Xeon Sapphire Rapids processor family, operating at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It is provisioned with 32.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. The instance does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, but it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 12 Gbps. This resource profile makes it suitable for general-purpose workloads, including application servers, containerized environments, and web serving.
